/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libecl_io.so.1.2.0 -o libecl_io.so.1.2.0 CMakeFiles/ecl_io.dir/poll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecl_io.dir/socketpair.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecl_io.dir/sockets.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib: /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib/libecl_errors.so.1.2.0
